properties.name: app.oauth2.login-success-redirect
properties.description: Frontend URL to redirect the browser to after OAuth login success.

properties.name: app.oauth2.login-failure-redirect
properties.description: Frontend URL to redirect the browser to after OAuth login failure.

properties.name: app.auth.cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether AUTH_TOKEN cookie should include the Secure attribute.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins for credentialed browser requests.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens.
